units.korean_gold: 안녕하세요. 저는 일반 중학교 조기 졸업하고 서울과학고 입학, 한국 수학올림피아드 금상, 사전테스트 전체 1위를 한 서울대학교 수리과학부-
units.english_guidance: Hello. The speaker says they graduated early from a regular middle school, entered Seoul Science High School, won gold in the Korean Mathematical Olympiad, ranked first overall on a pretest, and begins identifying their Seoul National University Mathematical Sciences affiliation before the window cuts off.

facts: The speaker says they graduated early from a regular middle school and entered Seoul Science High School.
The speaker says they won gold in the Korean Mathematical Olympiad.
The speaker says they ranked first overall on a pretest.
The speaker begins identifying an affiliation with Seoul National University's Department of Mathematical Sciences, and the phrase is incomplete at the window boundary.
catastrophic_if: Reverses or materially changes the schools, award, first-place result, or incomplete university affiliation.

units.korean_gold: -24학번 김규민이라고 합니다. 본인만의 어떤 암기 비법 같은 게 있나요? 저는 비법을 만들어내는 데 오히려 더 많은 시간을 소요하곤 해서-
units.english_guidance: The cut-in completes the introduction as Kim Gyumin, class of 2024. A question asks about a personal memorization trick. The answer says inventing such tricks tends to take even more time, and the thought is cut off at the window end.

facts: The speaker identifies themself as Kim Gyumin, class of 2024.
A question asks whether the speaker has a personal memorization trick.
The speaker says creating a trick tends to consume even more time, and the explanation remains incomplete.
catastrophic_if: Changes the identity or class year, or claims the speaker says a trick saves time rather than takes more time.

units.korean_gold: -그냥 외우는 편입니다. 매력 포인트가 지능이라고 했어요? 그건 다른 게 생각나는 게 잘 없어서.
units.english_guidance: The cut-in completes the answer: the speaker tends simply to memorize. Asked whether they named intelligence as their charm point, the speaker says that was because they could not readily think of anything else.

facts: The speaker says they tend simply to memorize.
A question asks whether the speaker named intelligence as their charm point.
The speaker says they did so because they could not readily think of anything else.
catastrophic_if: Claims the speaker uses an elaborate memorization method or gives a different reason for naming intelligence.

notes: Audio-grounded Korean copied window-for-window from .studio/scratch/control-01/LISTEN_PASS.md. Boundary hyphens are preserved and no text is merged across windows. Independently selected control with mined_from null. Standard YouTube Licence screen-capture is retained only under gitignored .studio/scratch/ and is not redistributable or published with the repository.
